channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: Fans of Taylor Swift were outside Madison Square Garden in s…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Fans of Taylor Swift were outside Madison Square Garden in scorching temperatures on Friday to try to catch a glimpse of Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding festivities. See more updates: www.nytimes.com/live/2026/07...
item.content:encoded: Fans of Taylor Swift were outside Madison Square Garden in scorching temperatures on Friday to try to catch a glimpse of Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding festivities. See more updates: www.nytimes.com/live/2026/07...

item.title: I didnt want to post about it but my cat edward passed today…
item.author: kris🌰 (@undasura.bsky.social)
item.description: I didnt want to post about it but my cat edward passed today from old age. I was told it was very peaceful for him, thankfully… if u could enjoy this photo i took of him very recently i’d be happy
item.content:encoded: I didnt want to post about it but my cat edward passed today from old age. I was told it was very peaceful for him, thankfully… if u could enjoy this photo i took of him very recently i’d be happy

item.title: EUの防衛即応態勢構築へ向けて、昨年末に採択された計画の具体的な項目が提案された。欧州委員会によるもの。空と海と宇宙にシ…
item.author: 臼井陽一郎 Yoichiro Usui (@usui1965.bsky.social)
item.description:
EUの防衛即応態勢構築へ向けて、昨年末に採択された計画の具体的な項目が提案された。欧州委員会によるもの。空と海と宇宙にシールドを構築、高機能ドローン開発および対ドローン防衛能力向上、東方監視体制確保に、1900億€（2036年まで）。SAFE（1500億€）とともに、防衛産業育成の柱となるプロジェクト。本気のEUを加盟国に見せたいというところか。理事会で承認され次第、スタートだが、なぜこれを欧州委員会がやるのかという権限問題＝主権問題が燻り続けているのでそこが政治化すると進まなくなる。

defence-industry-space.ec.europa.eu/commission-p...
item.content:encoded:
EUの防衛即応態勢構築へ向けて、昨年末に採択された計画の具体的な項目が提案された。欧州委員会によるもの。空と海と宇宙にシールドを構築、高機能ドローン開発および対ドローン防衛能力向上、東方監視体制確保に、1900億€（2036年まで）。SAFE（1500億€）とともに、防衛産業育成の柱となるプロジェクト。本気のEUを加盟国に見せたいというところか。理事会で承認され次第、スタートだが、なぜこれを欧州委員会がやるのかという権限問題＝主権問題が燻り続けているのでそこが政治化すると進まなくなる。

defence-industry-space.ec.europa.eu/commission-p...

item.title: にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧…
item.author: ねこぱすー@sync (@aria-sync.bsky.social)
item.description:
にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧
おはようございますんฅ⸃⸃🐾🐾
今日は朝から涼しい風が気持ちいいので今でも寝そう( ¯꒳​¯ )ᐝな所(*´ω｀*)
きんキラキラキラ金曜日なん🫓
今日も一日頑張るぞいو( ˙꒳˙ )٩
#おはようございます
#イマソラ
#空の向こう
item.content:encoded:

item.title: The heat wave affecting much of the U.S. has upended plans f…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The heat wave affecting much of the U.S. has upended plans for the country’s 250th birthday that were years in the making. A parade in Philadelphia, one of the largest in its history, was canceled on Friday, and the Great American State Fair closed for several hours. nyti.ms/4gljD3o
item.content:encoded: The heat wave affecting much of the U.S. has upended plans for the country’s 250th birthday that were years in the making. A parade in Philadelphia, one of the largest in its history, was canceled on Friday, and the Great American State Fair closed for several hours. nyti.ms/4gljD3o

item.title: これから関西出張。関西だと頭で分かってるのにいつかフラフラ大宮行きに乗ってしまいそうで怖い。逆もまた然りで。
item.author: 白央篤司 hakuo atsushi (@hakuo416.bsky.social)
item.description: これから関西出張。関西だと頭で分かってるのにいつかフラフラ大宮行きに乗ってしまいそうで怖い。逆もまた然りで。
item.content:encoded: これから関西出張。関西だと頭で分かってるのにいつかフラフラ大宮行きに乗ってしまいそうで怖い。逆もまた然りで。

item.title: ‎びっくり爆睡したぞ😴💤 ‎ ‎ワシは… ‎アメリカ時間に ‎起きてる必要がある ‎ ‎その為に寝るのは朝5時から …
item.author: Platinum(ぷらちな🤍) (@bluetauri.bsky.social)
item.description:
‎びっくり爆睡したぞ😴💤
‎
‎ワシは…
‎アメリカ時間に
‎起きてる必要がある
‎
‎その為に寝るのは朝5時から
‎３時間の睡眠を長年続けてる…
‎
‎それが今朝は…
‎びっくり5時間睡眠だよ〜😱
‎
‎まだ寝れたのに…
‎
‎家電☎️が鳴り響き…
‎起こされた！
‎
‎は～い！もしもし…
‎
‎『良かった！何してたのよ！』
‎
‎長女からだ…
‎
‎枕元のスマホを見ると…
‎LINEに
‎娘達のメッセージがズラリと…
‎
‎
‎『心配させないでよ🥹』と…
‎
‎長女の半泣き声を聞いたら
‎
‎ワシ…
‎寝たら悪いかなぁ〜と反省😂
‎
‎
item.content:encoded:
‎びっくり爆睡したぞ😴💤
‎
‎ワシは…
‎アメリカ時間に
‎起きてる必要がある
‎
‎その為に寝るのは朝5時から
‎３時間の睡眠を長年続けてる…
‎
‎それが今朝は…
‎びっくり5時間睡眠だよ〜😱
‎
‎まだ寝れたのに…
‎
‎家電☎️が鳴り響き…
‎起こされた！
‎
‎は～い！もしもし…
‎
‎『良かった！何してたのよ！』
‎
‎長女からだ…
‎
‎枕元のスマホを見ると…
‎LINEに
‎娘達のメッセージがズラリと…
‎
‎
‎『心配させないでよ🥹』と…
‎
‎長女の半泣き声を聞いたら
‎
‎ワシ…
‎寝たら悪いかなぁ〜と反省😂
‎
‎

item.title: 『幻想と怪奇』noteを更新しました。今回は、エリン・E・アダムス『贄の森』（岩瀬徳子訳 早川書房）を御紹介します。 n…
item.author: Katz@PanTraductia (@katzptd.bsky.social)
item.description:
『幻想と怪奇』noteを更新しました。今回は、エリン・E・アダムス『贄の森』（岩瀬徳子訳　早川書房）を御紹介します。
note.com/fancy_lion71...
なお、7月は水曜日が5日あるので、来週8日は休載します。次回の更新は15日になります。
item.content:encoded:
『幻想と怪奇』noteを更新しました。今回は、エリン・E・アダムス『贄の森』（岩瀬徳子訳　早川書房）を御紹介します。
note.com/fancy_lion71...
なお、7月は水曜日が5日あるので、来週8日は休載します。次回の更新は15日になります。

item.title: ハヤカワ新書創刊3周年イベントのイラスト担当させていただきました。 3周年おめでとうございます！

item.title: バーニー・サンダース上院議員とアレクサンドリア・オカシオ＝コルテス下院議員は、AIデータセンター建設のモラトリアムを求め…
item.author: 星 暁雄 (Akio Hoshi) (@akiohoshi.bsky.social)
item.description:
バーニー・サンダース上院議員とアレクサンドリア・オカシオ＝コルテス下院議員は、AIデータセンター建設のモラトリアムを求める法案"the Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act"を提出。

「20MW以上の電力を消費し、液体冷却を採用し、定格出力20kW以上のラックを備え、AIモデルの大規模なトレーニングや運用に使用される施設」の建設や拡張の一時停止を求める。
item.content:encoded:
バーニー・サンダース上院議員とアレクサンドリア・オカシオ＝コルテス下院議員は、AIデータセンター建設のモラトリアムを求める法案"the Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act"を提出。

「20MW以上の電力を消費し、液体冷却を採用し、定格出力20kW以上のラックを備え、AIモデルの大規模なトレーニングや運用に使用される施設」の建設や拡張の一時停止を求める。

item.title: Republicans currently hold a 218-212 majority in the House, …
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: Republicans currently hold a 218-212 majority in the House, so Democrats need to flip only a handful of seats to win control.

item.title: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth addr…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth address from behind George Washington's desk at City Hall. He was joined by recently naturalized U.S. citizens as he highlighted the ideals the founders of the nation put forward 250 years ago.
item.content:encoded: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth address from behind George Washington's desk at City Hall. He was joined by recently naturalized U.S. citizens as he highlighted the ideals the founders of the nation put forward 250 years ago.

item.title: The U.S. is blessed with one of the most scientifically and …
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
The U.S. is blessed with one of the most scientifically and technologically advanced health care systems in the world.

And yet, when it comes to health outcomes among the world’s wealthiest countries, the U.S. ranks last.

Read "Sick in a Hospital Town," a 5-part series:
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. is blessed with one of the most scientifically and technologically advanced health care systems in the world.

And yet, when it comes to health outcomes among the world’s wealthiest countries, the U.S. ranks last.

Read "Sick in a Hospital Town," a 5-part series:

item.title: A rare copy of the Declaration of Independence lost for 250 …
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: A rare copy of the Declaration of Independence lost for 250 years has been discovered in London, where it is now the only known example of its kind outside the United States.
item.content:encoded: A rare copy of the Declaration of Independence lost for 250 years has been discovered in London, where it is now the only known example of its kind outside the United States.

item.title: 1 year ago I decided to post my art on Bsky I'd had a contin…
item.author: D.D.B.Torres (@ddbtorres.bsky.social)
item.description:
1 year ago I decided to post my art on Bsky
I'd had a continuous history of flopping on social media and had little hope this one would be different

little did I know how many amazing people I'd meet here

thank you all for the support in this first rotation!
I can't express how much it means to me
item.content:encoded:
1 year ago I decided to post my art on Bsky
I'd had a continuous history of flopping on social media and had little hope this one would be different

little did I know how many amazing people I'd meet here

thank you all for the support in this first rotation!
I can't express how much it means to me

item.title: Peacock spiders are only 4mm long, but their courtship dance…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: Peacock spiders are only 4mm long, but their courtship dance rivals any bird of paradise. Australia has over 90 species of these tiny, ultra-colorful performers.
item.content:encoded: Peacock spiders are only 4mm long, but their courtship dance rivals any bird of paradise. Australia has over 90 species of these tiny, ultra-colorful performers.

item.title: Every other day, 83-year-old Marilyn Tewa of the Hopi Tribe …
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Every other day, 83-year-old Marilyn Tewa of the Hopi Tribe loads buckets into her pickup and drives 5 miles to haul water. “That’s what keeps us alive,” Tewa said.

Four states stand in the way of a deal to give her community water.

with @kjzz.org
item.content:encoded:
Every other day, 83-year-old Marilyn Tewa of the Hopi Tribe loads buckets into her pickup and drives 5 miles to haul water. “That’s what keeps us alive,” Tewa said.

Four states stand in the way of a deal to give her community water.

with @kjzz.org

item.title: The Supreme Court dealt Big Brother a blow on Monday with a …
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
The Supreme Court dealt Big Brother a blow on Monday with a landmark ruling for digital privacy rights in Chatrie v. United States.

Justices agreed 6-3 that police need a warrant to search your location data.
item.content:encoded:
The Supreme Court dealt Big Brother a blow on Monday with a landmark ruling for digital privacy rights in Chatrie v. United States.

Justices agreed 6-3 that police need a warrant to search your location data.

item.title: Before you get snobbish about e-readers, remember that they …
item.author: Dr. Redfern Jon Barrett (@redfernjon.bsky.social)
item.description:
Before you get snobbish about e-readers, remember that they allow large text for those with sight disabilities, alternate fonts for those with dyslexia, and can be laid down flat for those lacking mobility in their hands.

That last point is especially helpful for me right now.

Go e-readers!
item.content:encoded:
Before you get snobbish about e-readers, remember that they allow large text for those with sight disabilities, alternate fonts for those with dyslexia, and can be laid down flat for those lacking mobility in their hands.

That last point is especially helpful for me right now.

Go e-readers!

item.title: I don't usually post pictures of my adorable little rescue d…
item.author: Diane Baker Mason (@dianebakermason.bsky.social)
item.description: I don't usually post pictures of my adorable little rescue dog, Haggis, but I am feeling blue and bored today, so I encourage people to send celebratory likes and messages about how wonderful he is. I will soak those up.
item.content:encoded: I don't usually post pictures of my adorable little rescue dog, Haggis, but I am feeling blue and bored today, so I encourage people to send celebratory likes and messages about how wonderful he is. I will soak those up.

item.title: Hey, look, Messi is great and clearly the greatest of all-ti…
item.author: Charlotte Clymer (@charlotteclymer.bsky.social)
item.description: Hey, look, Messi is great and clearly the greatest of all-time at soccer, but Serena won a grand slam while she was pregnant.
item.content:encoded: Hey, look, Messi is great and clearly the greatest of all-time at soccer, but Serena won a grand slam while she was pregnant.

item.title: The kestrel can hover perfectly still mid-air, locking its h…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: The kestrel can hover perfectly still mid-air, locking its head in place while scanning for prey with UV-sensitive eyes that track rodent urine trails.
item.content:encoded: The kestrel can hover perfectly still mid-air, locking its head in place while scanning for prey with UV-sensitive eyes that track rodent urine trails.
